title: IFN-λ4 genetic variants influence clinical malaria episodes in a cohort of Kenyan children.
author: Samayoa-Reyes G Jackson C Ogolla S Sabourin K Obajemu A Dent AE Prokunina-Olsson L Rochford R
content:
S-EPMC8058600 PMC8058600 IFN-λ4 genetic variants influence clinical malaria episodes in a cohort of Kenyan children.

Background

Interferon (IFN)- λ4, a type III IFN, production is controlled by a dinucleotide frameshift variant (rs368234815-dG/TT) within the first exon of the IFNL4 gene
